data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of real-time availability sync to ClassPass, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the real-time sync functionality, indicating a clear gap in the evidence. Specifically, the lack of any API reads or persisted state checks related to the availability sync means that the requirement remains unverified.
evidencePointers: No evidence of real-time availability sync to ClassPass in prior steps.
gaps: Real-time availability sync to ClassPass is not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
